text:
There once was a man named Jack who ate cookies for breakfast. One morning, he found a giant packet of chocolate chip cookies in his oven. Excitedly, he grabbed a cookie and bit into it. But upon tasting the treat, he had swallowed an entire chocolate chip.

An emergency call was made to the fire department, who soon arrived to find the bizarre scene. After a brief investigation, it was concluded that Jack's unusual eating habit was the result of an infestation. Ants had somehow ended up inside the cookies, prompting Jack to consume one entire ant with his breakfast.

The fire chief laughed heartily and informed Jack that cookie ant medication was available. With apologies to the ants, Jack was saved and continued eating cookies, now slightly less adventurous. From that day forward, he added a pinch of ant powder to his treats. It wasn't quite the same sensation, but he accepted it with grace, knowing his cookie adventures couldn't compare to sharing cookies with friends.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
